kata — keybindings

Global                        Detail                                     Forms                       
?         help                tab            next tab                    ctrl+s         save or apply
q/ctrl+c  quit                shift+tab      prev tab                    esc            cancel       
P         projects            enter          jump to referenced issue    tab/shift+tab  change field 
L         toggle layout       esc/backspace  back                        ctrl+e         open editor  
                              e              edit body                   ctrl+u         clear prompt 
Graph                         c              new comment                                             
k       up                    p              set parent                  Filters                     
j       down                  b              add blocker                 /       search              
up      scroll up             l              add link                    s       cycle status filter 
down    scroll down           +              add label                   f       filter (form)       
pgup    page up               -              remove label                c       clear filters       
pgdown  page down             a              assign owner                ctrl+r  reset filter form   
g       first                 A              clear owner                                             
G       last                  !              set priority                                            
enter   open detail                                                                                  
space   expand/collapse       Children                                                               
n       new issue (form)      N      new child                                                       
o       toggle graph order    j/k    move child cursor                                               
x       close                 ↑↓     scroll detail viewport                                          
r       reopen                enter  open child                                                      

press ? to return
